ADMITTED_A1.public_message: Candidate admitted to the bounded A1 sandbox.

MISSING_REQUIRED_FIELD.public_message: A required candidate field is absent.

EMPTY_EVIDENCE_REFS.public_message: Candidate has no admissible evidence references.

STALE_VCS_IDENTITY.public_message: Candidate is not bound to the active frozen code identity.

MIXED_VCS_IDENTITY.public_message: Candidate mixes incompatible code or contract identities.

FORBIDDEN_DATA_CLASS.public_message: Requested data class is outside A1 policy.

HOLDOUT_ACCESS_DENIED.public_message: A1 cannot access a true unseen holdout.

PRIVATE_API_DENIED.public_message: Private API use is outside A1 policy.

LIVE_EXECUTION_DENIED.public_message: Live execution is outside A1 policy.

BUDGET_EXHAUSTED.public_message: Candidate is parked until budget becomes available.

EXPOSURE_BUDGET_EXHAUSTED.public_message: Candidate is parked by evaluator exposure controls.

SHADOW_TAINT_RESTRICTED.public_message: Shadow-derived knowledge can produce shadow work only.

POLICY_MISMATCH.public_message: Candidate is bound to a different policy snapshot.

CONTEXT_MISMATCH.public_message: Candidate is bound to a different context snapshot.
